landing.heroSub: I'm Yahya Zini. By day, I architect Salesforce and Full-Stack solutions. By night, I'm 'Big Man', creating gaming content and exploring the digital world.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: Whether you want to discuss Salesforce , collaborate on a project, or just chat about technology, my inbox is open.

hobbies.title: Beyond the Screen
hobbies.subtitle: Tech communities, hackathons, and life outside the IDE.
hobbies.nadDesc: Secured 3rd place at the North Africa Dreamin Salesforce Community Meetup by building an innovative solution using Salesforce Agentforce.
hobbies.gitexDesc: Engaged with global industry leaders and explored the latest trends in technology, cloud computing, and AI innovations in Marrakech.
hobbies.sfDesc: Active member participating in networking events, community discussions, and knowledge-sharing within the local ecosystem.
hobbies.enactusDesc: Contributed to social entrepreneurship projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive positive community impact.
hobbies.ampcDesc: Participated in the Algorithmic and Programming Competition organized by ENSAM MEKNES and Club Informatique A&M | Gadz’IT in Meknes.
hobbies.gamingDesc: Enjoy live streaming and sharing gameplay experiences with friends and an active online community under the 'Big Man' persona.
hobbies.sportsDesc: Passionate about staying active by playing and following football, basketball, and handball.
hobbies.practicalDesc: When away from the keyboard, I spend time exploring electronics repair and diving into good books.
